AboutUs.title: Trustworthy Leader in Glass & Aluminum Innovation

AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.subtitle: Precision, transparency, and structural integrity — crafted in every panel of glass and aluminum we install.
AboutPage.sloganDesc: "Quality is remembered long - producing safety glass with quality to be remembered forever."
AboutPage.visionDesc: "Striving to be the leader in the integrated glass processing business with comprehensive services."
AboutPage.valueQualityDesc: We curate high-quality, standard products and deliver them with honesty and integrity.
AboutPage.valueCraftDesc: Our experienced team advises and supports every client for smooth, precise installations.
AboutPage.valueModernDesc: A comprehensive glass processing factory built to meet high manufacturing standards.
AboutPage.branchesIntro: Three dedicated branches across Phuket, each specialising in materials, processing, and installation.
AboutPage.groupDesc1: One of the leading construction material providers in Phuket, operating in the distribution of aluminum, glass, ceiling works, and installation equipment, as well as a comprehensive glass processing factory that meets high manufacturing standards.
AboutPage.groupDesc2: We select standard, high-quality products and provide services with honesty and integrity. Our team is pleased to advise and take care of all clients in a friendly manner, ensuring smooth installations that truly satisfy customer needs.

branches.name: Thana Glass Aluminum Co., Ltd. (Headquarters)
branches.desc: A large construction materials warehouse in Phuket, providing distribution of aluminum, glass, ceiling works, and comprehensive installation accessories, focusing on standard high-quality products.

branches.name: Thana Glass Aluminum Co., Ltd. (Branch 00001)
branches.desc: A fully integrated glass processing factory, operating under the slogan "Quality is remembered long - producing safety glass with quality to be remembered forever."

branches.name: Thana Glass Thalang Co., Ltd.
branches.desc: A complete construction materials warehouse in the Thalang District of Phuket, providing distribution of aluminum, glass, ceiling, and various installation hardware.
